summary: Dashboard Profile drawer follows the confirmed dashboard web architecture: React/Vite/Tailwind/Motion renders a readonly overlay, kernel snapshot exposes capability_profile and capability_compliance, and .opennori remains the source of truth.
implementation_focus: Dashboard observation surface only: add a header Profile icon, expose profile/compliance in snapshots, render a readonly absolute-positioned drawer, and keep Profile out of Product AC radar nodes.
next: Use this apply record as architecture context when recording Product AC evidence.
